results.title: Wizards on wheels: Quirky parade returns to Grand Rapids this weekend
results.description: The whimsical event celebrates city's mysterious, roller-skating wizard, inviting participants to dress up and enjoy playful downtown festivities.

results.title: Matt Brittin breaks from norm to sit with BBC commissioners

results.title: Female Dogs and Directors Dominate Palm Dog Awards
results.description: Two films, two women directors, two female dogs. Sometimes the festival writes its own thematic through-lines. The Palm Dog — the beloved unofficial awards show celebrating the best canine performances across the festival’s official selection and various sidebars — has long since become a genuine Cannes fixture, founded by Toby Rose back in 2001. This [...] The post Female Dogs and Directors Dominate Palm Dog Awards appeared first on NYT News Today .
